audit_items.proof_trace: The reentrancy guard is correctly implemented: `bid()` sets `s_entered = true` at BaseAuction.sol:418 before any external call (safeTransfer at L444, auctionCallback at L449), and `isValidSignature` checks `if (s_entered) { revert Errors.ReentrantCall(); }` at its entry point (L125-126). Both functions share the same `s_entered` storage slot via inheritance (GPV2CompatibleAuction extends BaseAuction), and Solidity `view` functions observe live storage state within the same transaction.
